elements.text: It's the middle of the night and you wake up abruptly. As you sit up, you feel weird, like your mind isn't working right, and you start to think you might be going crazy. This thought frightens you, and you decide as you lay back down that you will just observe...

elements.name: late_night_sensation--mental_health--puzzle1
elements.incorrect_feedback: Whoops! That doesn't look right. Please wait a moment and try again.
